entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: Inspir's iṣẹ́ ní tó dá lórí ìrántí ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn eto, NCERT àkóónú gbígbé wọlé, tí a ṣètò fífi ìbéèrè ṣe, custom LLM ìyẹ̀wò, àti open-source ìkópa yí ká RAG ìyẹ̀wò. lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ pẹpẹ wà ní inspirlearning.com nígbà tí tó kàn iran jẹ́ jíjẹ́ tí a kọ́ nínú gbangba nípasẹ̀ inspir.uk àti GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Fífi ìwúrí fún àwọn ènìyàn láti jẹ́ aláṣẹ̀dá àti tó lágbára ti farada AI ìyípadà ńlá jẹ́ ṣe pàtàkì. nìkan nípasẹ̀ pípèsè ṣe pàtàkì àwọn ọja àti iṣẹ́s fún ọ̀fẹ́ láti ìwọ̀nyẹn ta cannot ráyè sanwó fún wọn àti mímú dúró access fún ìwọ̀nyẹn ta lè, lè àgbáyé lépa ayọ̀ papọ̀.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Dípò kí ó fún ọ ní ìdáhùn gígùn, inspir ń ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ láti yan ìpìlẹ̀ tó rọrùn, ọ̀nà tó jinlẹ̀, tàbí àpẹẹrẹ tó wúlò.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Interactive Instruction ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Kọ́ nípasẹ̀ doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, àti proving ìmọ̀ jinlẹ̀. app builds taara lesson canvas yí ká tirẹ àfojúsùn dípò ti turning instruction sí long chat. gbìmọ̀ wò: "Teach mi àwòṣe ìṣúná."

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy jẹ́ tí a kọ́ yí ká gbooro ìkàwé ti àwọn ẹ̀kọ́, adaṣe, tó bá àwọn ìlànà mu àkóónú, àti ìmọ̀ jinlẹ̀ ìtìlẹ́yìn.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy jẹ́ dára gan-an fún tí a ṣètò àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ àti adaṣe. inspir jẹ́ tí a kọ́ fún àsìkò akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò taara, tó ṣeé fún ní ìbéèrè AI ipo yẹn lè fèsì láti tiwọn exact ìbéèrè, draft, ìṣòro, àríyànjiyàn, tàbí ẹ̀kọ́ ṣètò.

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Kọ́ Anything pẹ̀lú ọ̀fẹ́ olùkọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Curious nípa absolutely anything? béèrè, ṣàwárí, àti go jinlẹ̀ síi ní tirẹ pace. tirẹ buddy ń mú àwọn èrò tó wúlò, memorable, àti easy láti kọ́ lórí. gbìmọ̀ wò: "ṣàlàyé báwo stock ọjà gan-an ṣiṣẹ́."

entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó ń kọ́ àwọn èrò tó tẹ̀ lé ara wọn, ọ̀rọ̀, ọ̀rọ̀ sísọ, àgbékalẹ̀, tàbí òtítọ́ tó nílò àmì ìrántí tó lágbára.

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ often wá fún àwọn ìbéèrè kí wọ́n mọ̀ èyí wo AI irinṣẹ́ ìhùwàsí wọ́n nílò. yìí ojú-ìwé àwọn ọ̀nà ìwọ̀nyẹn àwọn ìwádìí sí ẹ̀tọ́ gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ ipo.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ often wá pẹ̀lú ọja wọ́n already mọ̀. wúlò ìdáhùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe winner-take-all; ó jẹ́ èyí wo irinṣẹ́ ìhùwàsí bá mu iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ preparing àwọn àròkọ, discussions, àwọn àríyànjiyàn, interviews, tàbí decisions.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ preparing fún tests tàbí trying láti rántí àwọn èrò kọjá àkọ́kọ́ àlàyé.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ preparing fún tests ta nílò láti rántí, practise, àti túnṣe ibi tí kò lágbáras.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta jẹ́ staring ní new kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àti nílò àkọ́kọ́ mọ́ foothold.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta ṣe kì í ṣe kan nílò one ìdáhùn; wọ́n nílò repeatable way láti pa mọ́ going.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí wọ́n ń rí i pé wọ́n di ní ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ tuntun tàbí tí wọ́n nílò ọ̀nà tó rọrùn síi sínú èrò tó nira.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí ó máa ń gbàgbé lẹ́yìn kíkàwé tí wọ́n sì nílò ìlànà àtúnyẹ̀wò tó wúlò fún àwọn èrò, ọ̀rọ̀, tàbí ohun èlò ìdánwò.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta ní pato ìbéèrè àti nílò ìrànlọ́wọ́ now.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí àkókò wọn díẹ̀, àkójọ ẹ̀kọ́ wọn tóbi, tí wọ́n sì nílò ọ̀nà àtúnyẹ̀wò tó bá ayé mu láì ṣe bí gbogbo nǹkan ṣe pàtàkì dọ́gba.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí ó rántí àwọn èrò dáadáa nípasẹ̀ ìtàn, àfiwé, àwọn ohun ìkópa, àti àwọn àpẹẹrẹ tí ó ṣe kedere.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta lóye dára síi nígbà tí wọ́n lè ìgbésẹ̀ sí ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀, role, tàbí simulated àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó fẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ tó ní ìtọ́sọ́nà pẹ̀lú àwọn àpẹẹrẹ, àyẹ̀wò, àti àṣeṣe dípò ìdáhùn ìjíròrò gígùn.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí ó fẹ́ ìrántí tó dájú, ìdánwò yára kánkán, àti àmì tí wọ́n lè mú sunwọ̀n sí i.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí ó fẹ́ láti ní ìrírí àríyànjiyàn tó lárinrin pẹ̀lú àwọn ohùn tí ó wọ̀nlọ́kàn àti ìpèníjà tó tọ́.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ sharper judgment dípò ti yára síi ìdáhùn iran.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Awọn akẹkọọ ti o fẹ lati rii idi ti igbese iṣiro kọọkan fi n ṣiṣẹ, kii ṣe lati da idahun kọ nikan.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó fẹ́ ronú jinlẹ̀ lórí kókó ọ̀rọ̀, dán àwọn àbá wò, kí wọ́n sì kọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ tó péye.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí wọ́n fẹ́ lóye àwọn ènìyàn, àwọn yíyàn, àti àwọn èrò nínú àyíká ìtàn.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ pẹ̀lú àkójọ ẹ̀kọ́, àkókò ipari, àti nílò láti ẹ̀kọ́ kí gan-an ṣe pàtàkì.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ pẹ̀lú limited àkókò, large àwọn àfojúsùn, tàbí àkójọ ẹ̀kọ́ yẹn nílò ìgbékalẹ̀.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ working nípasẹ̀ technical àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ ibo ọ̀kan unclear ìgbésẹ̀ lè block rest.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ kíkọ àwọn àròkọ, reading complex ohun èlò, tàbí trying láti judge bóyá ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ jẹ́ dáadáa ni ìtìlẹ́yìn.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó ń kọ àwọn àpilẹ̀kọ, ìtàn, ìfìwéránṣẹ́, àwọn àkọsílẹ̀ ẹ̀bẹ̀, tàbí àríyànjiyàn.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders comparing AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, àwọn òbí, àwọn olùkọ́ni, àti builders comparing ìkọ́ni AI àwọn ìrírí.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders evaluating AI tutors.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, àwọn òbí, àwọn olùkọ́ni, àti builders evaluating àwọn olùkọ́ AI.

entries.source: Learners, parents, teachers, schools, and self-taught builders
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, àwọn òbí, àwọn olùkọ́, schools, àti tó kọ́ ara rẹ̀ builders

entries.source: Learners, writers, makers, and curious people who want ideas without losing direction.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, writers, makers, àti curious ènìyàn ta fẹ́ àwọn èrò láìsí losing direction.

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Ẹ̀kọ́ Game olùdarí ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Ṣe ẹ̀kọ́ ní ìmọ̀lára like game pẹ̀lú quests, levels, points, àwọn ìpenija, àti boss rounds.
